description: Surfe connects LinkedIn to your CRM, capturing and enriching contacts in one click with multi-source verified data, plus job-change alerts for sales teams.
overview: Surfe captures contacts from LinkedIn into your CRM in one click and enriches them with verified data from multiple providers, adding job-change alerts to keep records current.
what_is: Surfe is a sales-productivity tool that links LinkedIn with your CRM. It captures prospects from profiles in a click and enriches them with contact data pulled and cross-checked across multiple providers, so records land clean rather than half-filled.

It is most useful for sourcing leads, enriching contacts, and catching job changes that signal a new opportunity. Setup is quick, and it cuts the manual copy-paste and tab-switching that usually slows LinkedIn prospecting.

Surfe integrates natively with CRMs like Salesforce, HubSpot, Copper, and Pipedrive, fitting into the sales stack as an enrichment and capture layer. It is not a marketing-automation or analytics platform; it focuses on prospecting efficiency and data quality.
